items.name_en: 🔥Balloon New Small Canvas Bucket Bag 👜It looks like a bucket bag from the outside, using strong calfskin 🐮for the round bottom, plus Napa soft leather for the body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate, making its silhouette round like a balloon 🎈A Loewe💎we Anagram dice 🎲is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀ensuring a sturdy design 🥰Holds a soft interior body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of raffia and leather *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸Drawstring closure. Crossbody or hand carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐

Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of raffia and leather *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸Drawstring closure. Crossbody or hand carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐
Size: 25cm~18cm~13cm
Style No.: 9083
Color: Beige Canvas Brown

items.name_en: 🔥Balloon New Large Canvas Bucket Bag 👜 It looks like a bucket bag on the outside, using strong calf leather for the round bottom, and napa soft cowhide for the bag body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate and soft, making its outline round like a balloon 🎈. A Loewe 💎 Anagram dice 🎲 is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨. Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎. A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀, ensuring a sturdy design 🥰 that holds the soft bag body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of palm fiber and cowhide *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸. Buckle closure. Crossbody or handbag carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐
items.name_cn:
🔥Balloon New Large Canvas Bucket Bag 👜 It looks like a bucket bag on the outside, using strong calf leather for the round bottom, and napa soft cowhide for the bag body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate and soft, making its outline round like a balloon 🎈. A Loewe 💎 Anagram dice 🎲 is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨. Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎. A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀, ensuring a sturdy design 🥰 that holds the soft bag body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of palm fiber and cowhide *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸. Buckle closure. Crossbody or handbag carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐
Size: 31cm~21.5cm~16cm
Model: 9082
Color: Beige Canvas Brown

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟Smooth Calfskin Pebble Clutch. Features a foldable structure, tubular shoulder strap, and double iconic *Anagram Pebble. Adjustable shoulder strap, 63cm-123cm long. One interior pocket, leather lined with LO℮w℮ gold stamping, engraved with Anagram logo.

items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮New 🆕Mini Glossy Calfskin Puzzle Fold Handbag Inspired by the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series 🆕Reinterprets the brand's classic handbag series with geometric lines, featuring geometric architectural patchwork that allows the bag to fold completely flat, making it a perfect travel companion 🖤 The brand uses creative ingenuity to craft a soft and lightweight handbag, paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE brand logo. This mini version is crafted from glossy calfskin, can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld Removable and adjustable shoulder strap Suede lining L⊚℮w℮ embossed.

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Small Model 3901
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟 Small Model 3901
🆕 Nappa Squeeze Handbag 👜 A refined and feminine new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crumpled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft touch handle. This small version is crafted from Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend strap further *Magnetic snap closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.
size:29*10.5*24CM All steel hardware

items.name_en: Mini Puzzle geometric bag 👄L New model puzzle mini👉Mini No.10173, the most sought-after bag of 2019 ✔️ Same style as Mengwei Qiwei He Sui... Loewe latest model uses imported calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, YKK custom hardware. Don't let it be mini, it's super spacious, can hold plus size lipstick and powder with no pressure.
